data.description:
## Summary
The advanced .github/workflows/codeql.yml fails on main because GitHub code-scanning 'default setup' is ALSO enabled: SARIF upload is rejected with 'CodeQL analyses from advanced configurations cannot be processed when the default setup is enabled.' Only one config may own CodeQL. Also bring codeql.yml to current best practices.

## What
- Disable code-scanning 'default setup' (GitHub config) so the deliberate advanced workflow owns CodeQL (PATCH /repos/navapbc/rebar/code-scanning/default-setup state=not-configured).
- codeql.yml: init/analyze @v3 -> @v4 (v3 deprecating ~Dec 2026); add build-mode: none (Python); add timeout-minutes; keep security-and-quality suite; least-privilege perms already correct.

## Scope
- src/.github/workflows/codeql.yml
- GitHub repo code-scanning setting (default-setup -> not-configured)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] codeql.yml uses github/codeql-action @v4 with build-mode: none and a timeout.
- [ ] Default setup disabled so the advanced workflow's SARIF upload is accepted.
- [ ] The codeql workflow is green on main (SARIF uploaded, no upload-rejected error).
data.title: codeql CI red on main: advanced/default-setup collision + align codeql.yml to best practices
